style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial flow diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. Left: a box NAVIGATE TO ROUTE with a tag META: requiresAuth / requiresAdmin / guestOnly / layout. It flows into a diamond labelled beforeEach GUARD. Three branches: ALLOW then RENDER LAZY-LOADED VIEW (drawn as a small separate chunk box); NOT SIGNED IN then REDIRECT TO SIGN-IN (KEEP DESTINATION); NOT ADMIN then REDIRECT HOME. A small inline filter on the redirect arrow is labelled sanitizeRedirect — RELATIVE PATHS ONLY. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial flow diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. Left: a box NAVIGATE TO ROUTE with a tag META: requiresAuth / requiresAdmin / guestOnly / layout. It flows into a diamond labelled beforeEach GUARD. Three branches: ALLOW then RENDER LAZY-LOADED VIEW (drawn as a small separate chunk box); NOT SIGNED IN then REDIRECT TO SIGN-IN (KEEP DESTINATION); NOT ADMIN then REDIRECT HOME. A small inline filter on the redirect arrow is labelled sanitizeRedirect — RELATIVE PATHS ONLY. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
